name: second-brain-builder
description: Obsidian plugin that grows your vault into a linked knowledge graph using Claude Code, Gemini, Codex, or Ollama

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-modes.js && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.build:release: node scripts/sync-modes.js --sample && tsc -noEmit -skipLibCheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production && node scripts/package-release.js
